scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run type-check && node scripts/test-all-with-summary.js
scripts.test:backend: npm run lint:backend && npm run type-check:backend && npm run test:all --workspace=aletheia-backend
scripts.test:frontend: npm run lint:frontend && npm run type-check:frontend && npm run test --workspace=aletheia-frontend
scripts.test:unit: npm run lint && npm run type-check && node scripts/test-all-with-summary.js
scripts.test:e2e: npm run lint && npm run type-check && jest --config test/jest-e2e.json --coverage
scripts.test:e2e:backend: npm run lint:backend && npm run type-check:backend && jest --config test/jest-e2e.json --testPathPattern=test/e2e/backend --coverage
scripts.test:e2e:frontend: npm run lint:frontend && npm run type-check:frontend && npm run test:e2e --workspace=aletheia-frontend
scripts.test:e2e:integration: npm run lint && npm run type-check && jest --config test/jest-e2e.json --testPathPattern=test/e2e/integration --coverage
scripts.test:all: npm run lint && npm run type-check && node scripts/test-all-with-summary.js
scripts.test:complete: npm run lint && npm run type-check && node scripts/test-all-with-summary.js
scripts.clean:all: rimraf node_modules && rimraf aletheia-backend/node_modules && rimraf aletheia-frontend/node_modules && rimraf aletheia-backend/dist && rimraf aletheia-frontend/.next
